consistency.class_alignment: Consistent. The feature is explicitly labeled for the 'paladin' class.
consistency.level_relevance: Consistent. Level 1 features often grant core class mechanics like spellcasting focus.
consistency.description_accuracy: Accurate. It correctly describes the standard mechanic for Paladins using a holy symbol as a focus.

quality.clarity: High. The description is direct and unambiguous.
quality.completeness: Sufficient for the core mechanic. In a full ruleset, this might be cross-referenced with general spellcasting rules, but as a standalone feature entry, it is complete.
quality.impact: Fundamental. This ability defines how the Paladin class interacts with spellcasting components.

mechanics.trigger: When casting a paladin spell that requires a material component but no gold cost.
mechanics.effect: Allows substitution of the material component with an equipped holy symbol.
mechanics.potential_issues: None apparent based on the data provided. This mirrors standard 5e design.

analysis.suggested_changes: None required. The data is clean and accurate for representing this feature.
